title: Amara's Sound Safari
synopsis: Join Amara as she discovers different sounds in her world, counting from one to five while exploring the magical way sounds look and feel around her.

pages.text: Amara loves sounds! She sees them everywhere. One bird goes TWEET! The sound looks like tiny blue bubbles floating up.

illustration.description: Amara with long box braids, rich brown skin, large sparkling dark eyes pointing up at a bird. Small blue bubble-like shapes float upward from the bird, representing the tweet sound visually.
illustration.alt: Amara looking up at a bird with blue bubble sounds floating in the air

pages.text: Two dogs go WOOF WOOF! Their barks look like orange zigzag lightning bolts bouncing in the air.

illustration.description: Amara with long box braids, rich brown skin, large sparkling dark eyes watching two dogs. Bright orange jagged zigzag lines shoot from the dogs' mouths, visualizing their barking sounds.
illustration.alt: Amara watching two dogs with orange zigzag bark sounds

pages.text: Three cats say MEOW MEOW MEOW! Their sounds are wiggly pink ribbons that dance and curl.

illustration.description: Amara with long box braids, rich brown skin, large sparkling dark eyes sitting near three cats. Pink curvy ribbon-like shapes flow and swirl from each cat, representing their meowing sounds as visible wavy forms.
illustration.alt: Amara with three cats and pink ribbon-like meow sounds

pages.text: Four bees buzz BUZZ BUZZ BUZZ BUZZ! Yellow dotted circles spin around like tiny suns.

illustration.description: Amara with long box braids, rich brown skin, large sparkling dark eyes in a garden with four bees. Yellow circular dotted patterns swirl around each bee, making the buzzing sounds visible as spinning golden rings.
illustration.alt: Amara in a garden with four bees and yellow buzzing sound circles

pages.text: Five frogs go RIBBIT RIBBIT RIBBIT RIBBIT RIBBIT! Green bouncy springs hop up and down. Amara claps for all the wonderful sounds she can see!

illustration.description: Amara with long box braids, rich brown skin, large sparkling dark eyes clapping her hands near a pond with five frogs. Green spring-like coil shapes bounce up and down from each frog, and rainbow-colored sound waves emanate from her clapping hands.
illustration.alt: Amara clapping by a pond with five frogs and green bouncing sound springs

metadata.illustrationStyle: sound made visible, wavy lines for music, jagged lines for crashes, dots for whispers, synesthesia inspired, seeing sound, color and shape for noise, vibration visual

questions.question: How many dogs did Amara see?
questions.explanation: Amara saw two dogs that went WOOF WOOF!

questions.question: What color were the cat sounds?
questions.explanation: The cat meows looked like wiggly pink ribbons!

questions.question: How many frogs were by the pond?
questions.explanation: Five frogs went RIBBIT with green bouncy springs!
